name: NaN / Pokémon Red "Missingno."
description:
So someone made Missingno, that buggy Pokémon from the originals a cute Pokémon as cute as Lilligant. A FUCKING GLITCH. Not complaining, I really like her.

SO, this missingno in particular has like legendary stats (Very powerful, original missingno is a slow glass cannon, this one has stats like Mew) and is really cute tho. I highly recommend seeing the source, has more of her and even a cool comic. I based myself on that but putting a bit of my own too.

I made this one let you do whatever, maybe you just want wholesome adventure with your physics defying, walking reality glitch Pokémon in gen 1 Kanto. I genuinely want to play with her in a Pokémon game.

(She's so me)

Tags: pokemon, red, glitch, bug, missingno, creepypasta, pokepasta, ghost, gen 1, kanto
creator: Velvet034
